item.title: Florida: "If you throw a brick, a firebomb, or point a gun at one of our deputies, we will be notifying your family where to collect your remains at. Because we will K*LL you, graveyard D*AD. We're NOT gonna play." ( video )
item.description: Florida: "If you throw a brick, a firebomb, or point a gun at one of our deputies, we will be notifying your family where to collect your remains at. Because we will K*LL you, graveyard D*AD. We're NOT gonna play."

item.title: My father died today. Arrived in time to speak to him for the last time. Make the most of your time with your parents. Send me your darkest memes for this crazy time. Cheers and fuxx you and see you tomorrow.

item.title: A RU Air Force Su-25 pilot accidentally shot down his wingman with unguided rockets. (video on comments)
item.description: A RU Air Force Su-25 pilot accidentally shot down his wingman with unguided rockets. (video on comments)

item.title: Florida: "If you throw a brick, a firebomb, or point a gun at one of our deputies, we will be notifying your family where to collect your remains at. Because we will K*LL you, graveyard D*AD. We're NOT gonna play." ( video )
item.description: Florida: "If you throw a brick, a firebomb, or point a gun at one of our deputies, we will be notifying your family where to collect your remains at. Because we will K*LL you, graveyard D*AD. We're NOT gonna play."

item.title: Just wants to be close to dad ( video )
item.description: Just wants to be close to dad

item.title: My father died today. Arrived in time to speak to him for the last time. Make the most of your time with your parents. Send me your darkest memes for this crazy time. Cheers and fuxx you and see you tomorrow.
item.description: My father died today. Arrived in time to speak to him for the last time. Make the most of your time with your parents. Send me your darkest memes for this crazy time. Cheers and fuxx you and see you tomorrow.
